headline: Schefter: Raiders got offer they couldn't refuse in Maxx Crosby trade
description: Adam Schefter discusses the Raiders' decision to trade Maxx Crosby to the Ravens for two first-round draft picks.

headline: 2026 NFL draft order: 32 first-round picks, Raiders at No. 1
description: The Raiders, Jets and Cardinals hold the top three picks in the 2026 NFL draft. See the rest of the order -- plus each team's top need.

headline: The story behind NFL draft prospect Gennings Dunker's mullet
description: NFL draft prospect Gennings Dunker joins Rich Eisen to tell the story behind his viral mullet.

headline: Mike Clay's fantasy football rookie rankings for 2026: Love on top
description: With the NFL draft fast approaching, Mike Clay provides his rankings and analysis of 80 of the top skill position players from the combine and what to expect in fantasy.

headline: Does Panthers' offseason checklist include replacing Dalton?
description: We examine five key roster issues Carolina is aiming to upgrade during free agency and the draft.

headline: DJ Moore to Bills: Impact on Bears' free agency, draft, more
description: Will trading DJ Moore's contract open a door for Bears to pursue Tyler Linderbaum? That's one of eight questions we answer about the trade.

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Reid's pick predictions in Rounds 1-2
description: Following the combine and a few big trades this week, Jordan Reid projects the first two rounds of the 2026 NFL draft. See all 64 pick predictions.
